chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 2584 of 2025 [M/s. All Orangi Qingqi Rickshaw & CNG Rickshaw Association vs. POS & others] Petitioner: M/s. All Orangi Qingqi Rickshaw and CNC Rickshaw Association through Mr. Muhamad Saleem, Advocate. Respondents 1-7: Province of Sindh through Chief Secretary and others through Mr. Shaharyar Qazi, Assistant Advocate General Sindh alongwith M/s. Aijaz Ahmed Shaikh, SSP Traffic, District City, M. Tufail, DSP (Legal), TRO, Karachi and Raza Mian, DSP (Legal), CPO, Karachi. Dr. Waqar Memon, Advocate alongwith Mr. Nazakat Hussain Shahani, Secretary, Regional Transport Authority, Karachi. Mr. Yar Muhammad, Legal Consultant, Transport Department. Date of hearing: 11-11-2025 Date of decision: 11-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Today, comments are filed by the Respondent No.4 – DIG Traffic, Karachi – to place on record a notification dated 16-06-2025 issued by the Commissioner, Karachi to impose a ban on the plying of 1+2 and 1+4 motor rickshaws on certain main roads of Karachi, and to further constitute a Grievance Redressal Committee vide notification dated 15-07-2025. The Petitioner, in his capacity as President of M/s. All Orangi Qingqi Rickshaw and CNG Rickshaw Association is included as a Member in the Grievance Redressal Committee. Counsel for the Petitioner therefore confines the petition for an order directing the Deputy C.P. No. D – 2584 of 2025 Commissioner (East), Karachi, Chairman of the Committee to convene a further meeting to take up the grievances of the Petitioner Association. The AAG Sindh and counsel for the Respondents undertake to call a meeting of the Grievance Redressal Committee within three weeks.

D – 2584 of 2025 Commissioner (East), Karachi, Chairman of the Committee to convene a further meeting to take up the grievances of the Petitioner Association. The AAG Sindh and counsel for the Respondents undertake to call a meeting of the Grievance Redressal Committee within three weeks. In view of subsequent notifications discussed above, the petition becomes infructuous. Therefore, we dispose of the petition alongwith pending applications by directing the Deputy Commissioner (East) Karachi to call another meeting of the Grievance Redressal Committee within three weeks to hear the remaining grievances of the Petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
